title: Papa pushes Eva on the swing (Sara watching)
prompt: Mid-side cinematic shot of @playground-swings — green-frame swing-set with rubber kid-seats, mulch ground, soft warm golden-hour light. POSITION LOCK — Eva stays seated on the swing throughout. Papa stays at Eva's back at the swing throughout. Sara stays at the side throughout. Only the swing's gentle pendulum motion changes between beats. Exactly THREE people in the frame. @Eva already softly seated on the swing with both hands gripping the swing chains at chest height, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow, both feet softly hanging slightly above the mulch, beaming with cheerful kid joy. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both on the swing chains. Eva stays seated on the swing throughout the entire 10s — never lets go, never falls off. @Papa already standing on the mulch directly behind the swing with both feet planted, both hands gently placed on the back of the swing seat at hip height, ready to push softly. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both on the back of the swing seat. Papa stays at this exact spot behind the swing throughout. @Sara already standing on the mulch on the LEFT side of the swing-set about three steps away with both feet planted, ponytail with bow, both hands cupped softly at her cheeks in a delighted spectator pose, beaming with sister joy. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both at her cheeks. Sara stays at this exact spot throughout the entire 10s. The mulch and swing stay plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Papa gently gives Eva a soft, low push on the swing — Eva rises a small comfortable arc forward then gently swings back. Eva (cheerful sing-song joy, both hands still on chains): "Wheeee! Daddy!" Papa (warm cheerful dad-voice from behind): "Hold on tight, little astronaut!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva swings forward and back again in a gentle continuous motion. Sara watches happily from her exact spot, both hands still at her cheeks. Sara (warm sister-cheering): "Higher, sister! Higher!" Eva (laughing in mid-swing, both hands gripping chains): "Higher, Daddy, higher pleeeeease!" Papa (warm chuckling): "Coming up!" Cheerful warm kid-show golden-hour lighting throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both gripping the swing chains. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both on the swing seat back. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both at her cheeks. Eva stays seated on the swing throughout — never lets go, never falls. Papa stays at Eva's back throughout. Sara stays at her exact spot throughout. The swing motion is GENTLE and SAFE — no high arcs, no flipping, no spinning, no chains breaking.
